explanation: The Sigma rule detects renamed AdFind.exe by checking for specific command-line arguments. This command renames the executable and uses equivalent arguments to trigger the rule while staying syntactically valid.
This command uses a full path to AdFind.exe with a common argument and suppresses output. It avoids suspicious command-line patterns while still matching the rule's detection criteria.
This PowerShell command invokes AdFind.exe using a full path and standard arguments. It avoids obfuscation while still matching the rule's detection criteria.
This command runs AdFind.exe with a standard argument and suppresses output. It maintains the same behavior as the original command while avoiding suspicious command-line patterns.
This command uses PowerShell's Start-Process cmdlet to launch AdFind.exe with standard arguments. It avoids direct command-line execution patterns while still matching the rule's detection criteria.
